translation.byCountry: By country of origin of the event
translation.week-days: Sun, Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat
translation.month-names: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec
translation.tooltip-by-country-panel: Country of origin of the events
translation.tooltip-general-panel: Sum of views, downloads and links
translation.help-country-title: How to interpret the "By Country" panel
translation.help-step1-subtitle: Configure what data you want to see
translation.help-step2-subtitle: Metrics for the selected level — hover to see description
translation.help-step2-info: If the level is "Total events", each metric sums the 3 levels: LA Referencia + Repository + National Node.
translation.help-step2-total-tip: Sum of views, downloads and outlinks at the selected level.
translation.help-step2-views-tip: Number of times the item was viewed.
translation.help-step2-downloads-tip: Number of times the item was downloaded.
translation.help-step2-outlinks-tip: Clicks on links pointing to the item.
translation.help-step2-conversions-tip: User who viewed and then downloaded the item in the same session, or clicked the external link.
translation.help-conversion-text: It occurs when the same user in the same session downloads an item (article, thesis, etc.) after having viewed it in the repository, or when they click the link that leads to the item outside the repository level.
translation.help-step3-subtitle: Monthly evolution of events in the selected period
translation.help-step3-info: Each bar represents a month. The segments show distribution by event type. The overlaid line represents conversions. Hover over a bar to see the breakdown.
translation.help-step3-x-desc: Each column = one month within the selected range.
translation.help-step3-y-desc: Events accumulated by type in that month.
translation.help-c1-step1-subtitle: Interact with the chart to filter by country
translation.help-c1-step1-info: Hover over the pie chart to see statistics for the selected country across all levels.
translation.help-c1-views-tip: Views from the country across all levels in the selected range.
translation.help-c1-downloads-tip: Downloads from the country across all levels in the selected range.
translation.help-c1-outlinks-tip: Outlink clicks from the country across all levels in the selected range.
translation.help-c1-conversions-tip: Conversions from the country across all levels in the selected range.
translation.help-c2-step2-subtitle: Distribution of events by country of origin
translation.help-c2-step2-info: Each segment represents a country. Its size reflects its share of total events (views + downloads + outlinks). Hover over a segment to update the panels above.
translation.help-c3-step3-subtitle: Explore data filtered by geographic region
translation.help-c3-continent-desc: Filters the map and table. Only countries with events in the selected period are shown.
translation.help-c3-map-desc: Color intensity reflects the number of events. Hover to see each country's detail.
translation.help-c3-table-desc: Lists countries in the continent with their total events, sorted from highest to lowest.
translation.help-c3-country-desc: Click a country in the table or map to see its detailed statistics in the panels above.
